1. Added: "Card Flip" and "Wish Summont" events.
2. Optimized: Payment pop-up windows.
3. Optimized: Visual effects for Dark Shaman's [Hex] ability.
4. Optimized: Improved various features, adjusted dungeon attributes, and updated event rewards.

title: Mystery Town: Merge Games
notes: More exciting events will be launched one after another, stay tuned！

title: League of Legends: Wild Rift
notes:
Get your FEAST ON in patch 7.2! From July until September: 

• NEW CHAMPS:Grow your game with Yunara and Cho’Gath.
• RANKED: Major progression update.
• GAMEPLAY: New active items replacing enchantment mechanic.
• GAME MODES: New AAA ARAM season with new augments and runes.


Read more at https://wildrift.leagueoflegends.com.

title: Cooking Madness-Kitchen Frenzy
notes:
A new update is available for Cooking Madness!

A brand-new restaurant is opening in Serene Switzerland!
- Wander through the streets of Geneva, and enjoy Swiss jam cookies, carrot cakes, and other delicious treats!

Quality-of-life changes:
- Enhanced system performance and gameplay mechanics.

Have fun cooking, Chefs!

title: Mob Control
notes: - Technical release to improve Mob Control's stability and performance.

title: Bingo Voyage: Live Bingo Games
notes:
Thank you for being part of our amazing community! We are dedicated to bringing you the #1 gaming experience, and this update is no exception.

Update now to enjoy: 
• Fresh in-game events and rewards
• A smoother, bug-free experience
• Exciting new improvements and surprises

Ready to play? Let’s go! Don't forget to leave us a review—we love hearing from you!

title: Candy Crush Soda Saga
notes:
Sodalicious! We update our game every week with exciting levels, improvements to the game, and fun new features. Download the latest version to check it out!
Joining us after a break? Welcome back! New to the game? You’ll be a pro before you know it!
